modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need to cancel tutor session and find new one fast.

full_description_text: I want to cancel my tutor. How I get new tutor quick? I am in Academic & Career Planning Center. Please help me.
